title: An Act to Replace the Maine Waterway Development and Conservation Act with the Maine Renewable Energy and Associated Transmission Development and Conservation Act
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 12, 2026
last_house_action: 1/27/2026 - Committee on Environment and Natural Resources suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/12/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
